testcase.name: loginPageTitleTest

failure.message: LoginPage is not correct expected [Order Management System new Version 2] but found [file:///C:/ProgramData/Jenkins/.jenkins/workspace/OMSWebAppliaction_Test/Order%20Management%20System.html]
